title: Spicy Flaky Flax Eggs Grill
description: A keto-friendly spicy flaky dish perfect for a solo dinner, featuring a unique blend of flax eggs seasoned with heat and served on a grill.
instructions: Soak the flax seeds in water for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a small bowl, mix together flax seeds with water, garlic powder, red pepper flakes, salt, and olive oil.
Stir until all ingredients are well combined and smooth.
Divide the flax mixture into eight portions, pressing each portion into a thin round shape on a lightly greased skillet or pan.
Place on preheated grill for about 3-4 minutes per side until golden brown and firm but not cooked all the way through.
Serve hot with your choice of sides.
